title: volkameria macrantha
intro: Volkameria macrantha, also known as the large-flowered volkameria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of volkameria macrantha include reducing fever and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to make a herbal tincture or oil.
